name: Brinno BCC300-M Outdoor Time-Lapse Camera Bundle
description: The Brinno BCC300-M Outdoor Time-Lapse Camera Bundle includes a TLC300 time-lapse camera, an ATH120 waterproof housing, an AWM100 wall mount, and two bungee cords for a time-lapse video recording solution.

features.Key Features:: TLC300 Outdoor Time-Lapse Camera | ATH120 Waterproof Housing Included | 1080p Resolution | 1.44" Crystal IPS LCD Screen | AWM100 Wall Mount & Two Bungee Cords | 118° Field of View | Four AA Batteries Included | Battery Life up to 100 Days | Supports microSD Cards up to 128GB | Weather-Resistant Camera & Housing
